india_trends.title: Eternal share price jumps over 4% after Q4 results. Should you buy, sell or hold the Zomato parent’s stock?
india_trends.summary: Eternal share price has gained 11% in one month, but the stock has fallen 9% on a year-to-date (YTD) basis. The stock has rallied 12% in one year and has surged 34% over the past two years.

india_trends.title: Maruti Suzuki share price jumps 3.5% on strong Q4 results: Should you buy, sell, or hold?
india_trends.summary: Maruti Suzuki's shares rose 3.5% after reporting Q4FY26 results with 28.2% revenue growth to ₹52,449 crore. However, net profit fell 7% to ₹3,591 crore due to rising input costs. The company announced a final dividend of ₹140 per share for FY26.

india_trends.title: Taiwan overtakes Canada to become 6th largest stock market as AI demand lifts TSMC m-cap to $1.8 trillion

india_trends.title: India proposes new vehicle rules to allow higher ethanol-blended fuels
india_trends.summary: India has proposed amendments to its motor vehicle rules to formally integrate higher ethanol-blended fuels, including E85 (85% ethanol) and E100 (nearly pure ethanol). This move follows the nation's achievement of its E20 target and aims to further reduce reliance on expensive petroleum imports.

india_trends.title: Negative Breakout: These 7 stocks closed below their 200 DMA
india_trends.summary: Seven large-cap stocks slipped below their 200-day moving averages, indicating weakening technical momentum and a potential bearish trend. This breakdown reflects selling pressure and caution among investors, as the 200 DMA is widely tracked as a key long-term support level in market trend analysis.

india_trends.title: Downside growth risks outweigh inflation concerns, RBI likely to hold rates this fiscal: Crisil
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India's Monetary Policy Committee is expected to hold interest rates steady this fiscal year. Economic growth concerns are seen as more pressing than inflation risks. Producers face higher costs, but consumer prices are contained. The government aims to reduce its fiscal deficit.
